channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker

item.title: Meta grants executives up to $921 million in stock options on the same day it lays off 700 workers
item.description: Meta disclosed in SEC filings on Tuesday that it had granted stock options to six of its most senior executives, the first such awards since the company’s 2012 IPO. Hours later, it laid off approximately 700 employees across Reality Labs, recruiting, sales, a… [Meta]
